title: Fast Fiction Factory Review Hub IA Mode Split
purpose: Focused local Review Hub IA improvement that separates Story Review, Source Audit, Project Cockpit, and Artifacts modes, adds Japanese-facing display labels, removes awkward sticky Raw Story Memo behavior, and keeps source-span/model-boundary evidence reachable without starting model/API work.
generated_from: User review: Review Hub too vertically long, English-first, layered between story and project information, and Raw Story Memo sticky behavior feels awkward

$missing = $files | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }; if ($missing) { throw ('Missing files: ' + ($missing -join ', ')) }; $manifest = Get-Content artifacts/artifact-manifest.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($manifest.artifact_id -ne 'fff-review-hub-ia-mode-split-001') { throw 'Manifest artifact id mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_source_span_artifact_id -ne 'fff-source-span-routing-review-pack-001') { throw 'Preserved source-span artifact mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_model_api_boundary_artifact_id -ne 'fff-model-api-boundary-spec-001') { throw 'Preserved model/API boundary artifact id mismatch' }; if ($manifest.review_input_mode -ne 'freeform') { throw 'Review input mode mismatch' }; $html = Get-Content public/review/index.html -Raw -Encoding UTF8; @('fff-review-hub-ia-mode-split-001', 'Story Review', 'ストーリーレビュー', 'Source Audit', '抽出根拠レビュー', 'Project Cockpit', 'プロジェクト状態', 'Artifacts', '成果物・検証', 'Review Debt', '要確認事項', 'Human-owned guards', '人間判断で保持', 'fff-source-span-routing-review-pack-001', 'artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json', 'fff-model-api-boundary-spec-001', 'externalCallAllowed: false', 'data-review-mode="story"', 'data-mode-target="source"', 'data-mode-panel="source"') | ForEach-Object { if (-not $html.Contains($_)) { throw ('Missing required Review Hub text: ' + $_) } }; if ($html -match 'position:\s*sticky') { throw 'Unexpected sticky positioning remains' }; if ($html -match '<details class="source-span-fixture" open') { throw 'Source-span fixtures must not default open' }; node tools/fff-source-span-review-pack.mjs artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-smoke-result.json artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json; Get-ChildItem artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs -Filter *.json | ForEach-Object { node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction $_.FullName; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw ('Adapter output validation failed: ' + $_.Name) } }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/current-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/sample-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction-fixtures artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures; $pack = Get-Content artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $pack.passed) { throw 'Source-span review pack failed' }; if ($pack.cross_fixture_summary.fixture_count -ne 3 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.total_elements -ne 36 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.source_span_mismatches -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.missing_source_refs -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.unsafe_visual_routing -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.non_held_review_defaults -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.human_owned_decision_adopt_suggestions -ne 0) { throw 'Source-span review pack guard mismatch' }; Write-Output 'Review Hub IA mode split validation passed' }

review_prompt_hint: Review the four modes in natural language. Useful feedback can mention whether Story Review, Source Audit, Project Cockpit, and Artifacts feel separated, whether Japanese display labels reduce friction, whether the page feels less vertically overwhelming, whether Raw Story Memo behavior is more predictable, and whether source-span review remains reachable.
